title: Day 36 -  Kanji Practice
html:
Day 36 - Kanji Practice

Please download today's kanji practice here: Kanji Practice Day 36.pdf

Practising writing kanji every day is a very important exercise to help you learn quickly. If you have any questions you can always ask other students and teachers in the community here.

Refer back to the Week 8 - Kanji lesson to watch how to do the correct stroke order for 書, 友, 休.
